title: Create Section Permissions of monday.docs/Dashboards/Boards
excerpt: We have a scenario where we have boards that would feed a Colleague Board where some of the information would be “personal” but some of the information we would want all of our team to see, instead of creating three sepa…

posts.author: amy.douglas (Amy Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a scenario where we have boards that would feed a Colleague Board where some of the information would be “personal” but some of the information we would want all of our team to see, instead of creating three separate views of the monday.doc or creating or three different table view/select columns etc, is monday thinking about creating a way where we could select areas of a board, dashboard or monday.doc where certain users would have permissions. This would be super helpful so that we would not have to have a “team view” view of the colleagues information, the personal development view of the colleagues information. Think of these views as summaries of a compilation of other boards so there would already be data feeding, when you have to have 3 summary boards * 50 people that 150 board to manage (just on personal information) that can add up quickly.
